_strict_reconciliation.basis: SG Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Proposed acquisition of a controlling interest
no LCXNet announcement has yet been made
no selective disclosure outside of LCXNet announcements
No personal data other than business contact information will be shared pre-signing
Parties: Asterline Holdings Ltd. (LCX-SG: AHL0) as Offeror; Novalux Robotics Ltd. (LCX-SG: NVX0) as Target; arrangement vehicle: Orion Acquisition Pte. Ltd., all Singapore-incorporated.
Transaction type: Proposed acquisition of a controlling interest in the Target via a scheme of arrangement or share purchase agreement (to be elected), governed by Singapore law.
Consideration: Combination of cash and new Offeror shares; exact mix and any ratios to be determined following independent valuation and a fairness opinion; no price guidance is provided herein.
Financing: Funding sources are expected to include committed bank facilities and internal resources; no firm amounts, pricing, or leverage ratios are set out in this document.
